description: Hard golden set: corpus-analyzed difficult queries stressing all IR metrics

categories.hard_exact_rank1: Truncated long title — MRR/P@1 must find exact source at rank 1
categories.hard_partial_common: Partial query with corpus-common words — precision under noise
categories.hard_graded_cluster: Multi-doc cluster with 3/2/1 grades — nDCG and recall
categories.hard_ambiguous_recall: Ambiguous single token with many sample matches — recall@50
categories.hard_abstract_gap: Abstract-only terms absent from title — semantic recall
categories.hard_paraphrase: NL paraphrase with low lexical overlap — vector recall
categories.hard_distractor_ranking: Similar-title peers; anchor must outrank distractors

metric_definitions.recall_50: Fraction of judged relevant docs found in top 50
metric_definitions.precision_1: Relevant doc at rank 1 (strict top-1 accuracy)
metric_definitions.mrr: Reciprocal rank of first relevant doc
